summary: SportLyo Phase 2 Workflow Prestataire ↔ Organisateur - ALL FEATURES VERIFIED AND WORKING. Fixed routing issue for /api/provider/selections/stats endpoint. Backend: All 11 pytest tests pass. Frontend: Provider Selections tab shows pending badge, selections grouped by organizer with logo, Personnaliser button opens customization dialog. Organizer Boutique shows customization_status badges (En attente/Pret) on provider products.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/organizer/add-provider-product creates selection document in 'selections' collection
Backend: GET /api/provider/selections returns selections grouped by organizer with logo, products, status
Backend: PUT /api/provider/selections/{id}/customize/{index} updates product images and auto-syncs to organizer's product
Backend: GET /api/provider/selections/stats returns counts by status (total, pending, in_progress, ready, total_products, customized_products)
Frontend: Provider dashboard has 'Selections' tab with badge showing pending count
Frontend: Selections view shows stats cards (En attente, En cours, Prets)
Frontend: Selections view shows organizer name, logo, products with customization status
Frontend: Clicking 'Personnaliser' opens dialog to upload photos
Frontend: Dialog shows 'Ajouter les photos personnalisees (0/10)' button
Frontend: Organizer product cards show 'PRESTATAIRE' badge for provider products
Frontend: Organizer product cards show 'EN ATTENTE' customization status badge (amber)
Frontend: Organizer product cards show 'PRET' customization status badge (green)
Frontend: Organizer can view and add products from 'Catalogue prestataire' tab

fixes_applied.issue: GET /api/provider/selections/stats was returning 404 because it was defined AFTER /{selection_id} route
fixes_applied.fix: Moved /stats endpoint BEFORE /{selection_id} endpoint to ensure correct route matching

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Selections workflow fully tested and working. The existing selection (sel_11d36e91959a) has 1 customized product. Provider dashboard Selections tab at lines 459-612 in ProviderDashboard.js shows: stats cards, selection cards with organizer logo, Personnaliser button that opens customize dialog. OrganizerDashboard.js lines 2118-2119 show customization_status badges (En attente/Pret). Backend selections.py has stats endpoint correctly ordered before detail endpoint. The customize endpoint auto-syncs images to organizer's product copy and sets customization_status to 'ready'. When all products customized, selection status auto-changes to 'ready' and notification sent to organizer.

elements: Selections tab with badge showing pending count
Stats cards: En attente, En cours, Prets
Selection cards showing organizer logo, name, products
Demarrer button to change status to in_progress
EN ATTENTE badge (amber) for pending customization
Photo count indicator for customized products

auto_sync_feature.description: When provider customizes a product in selection, images auto-sync to organizer's product copy
